build.buildCommand: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput

deploy.startCommand: cd backend && python manage.py migrate --noinput && DJANGO_SUPERUSER_USERNAME=$SUPERUSER DJANGO_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD=$SUPERUSER_PASSWORD DJANGO_SUPERUSER_EMAIL=$SUPERUSER_EMAIL python manage.py createsuperuser --noinput || true && daphne -b 0.0.0.0 -p $PORT logographic_chat.asgi:application
